description: Every skill effect has a type (push, damage, burn, etc.). Every interactable object has an effect value for each effect type. The SAME variable is used on caster and target: the caster's value multiplies, the target's value divides.
rule: final_force = base_force × caster.effect / target.effect. If not defined, defaults to 1.

push.description: Physical knockback. Moves the target away from the caster.

engine_mapping.godot: CharacterResource.push_effect (caster). GameObject.push_effect (target). Same name, different role.
